creator: amzo1337@gmail.com
text:
I believe the 13.1 build issue is due to absl being updated in ports. Tensorflow is soo finicky that it breaks so easily. I won't have time to relook at it until Summer after I finish my other projects.

The reason ignoring unresolved symbols was because the external packages that the build system loads sets them to hidden, and there was some changes to environ that caused build issues. I can't remember exactly, it's been quite a few month since I looked at it, but since the build system was loading external build files that was fetched by make, the best way to deal with it was to ignore them.

environ had changed between 12 to 13 which is why builds originally worked on 13, but not on 12
